title: Creamy Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with tender beans and a rich creamy sauce.

ingredients.name: beans
ingredients.notes: such as kidney or black beans

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the dried beans, diced tomatoes, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Pour in the creamy sauce and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a simmer and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
